jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Columbia Asia
jsonLd.description:
Columbia Asia has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Columbia Asia:
Columbia Asia is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
